ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend
Off Calendar Mar-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TRADER JOE'S COMPANY'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Amend.

Defendant Trader Joe's Company's motion to dismiss the complaint for Plaintiff's failure to amend it after Trader Joe's demurrer was sustained with leave to amend is granted. The complaint is dismissed pursuant to CCP 581(f)(2).

ORDER IS SIGNED.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Defendant's unopposed motion to strike portions of the complaint is granted with leave to amend.
